creator: filiperocha@gmail.com
text:
Along with numerous bug fixes and fine-tuning, OJS 2.1.1 includes many 
new features:

    * Atom / RSS / RSS2 (via plug-in)
    * Announcements feature
    * COUNTER Journal Report 1a
    * Thesis abstracts (via plug-in)
    * TinyMCE support (via plug-in)
    * CrossRef export support (via plug-in)
    * PubMed export support (via plug-in)
    * Merge Accounts feature
    * Turkish language support (tr_TR)
    * French language support (fr_CA)
    * Italian language support (it_IT)
    * Russian language support (ru_RU)
